metadata.title: Polite — MVP

phrase-browser.fallback-title: Anti-stupor: ask them to repeat more slowly or clarify
phrase-browser.footer-next-step: Next we will add offline support (Next-PWA) and a simple CMS (Supabase) for editing packs.

phrase-browser.page-description: Quick phrases with phonetics, likely replies, and an anti-stupor button. Packs: auto service, market, pharmacy, transport.
phrase-browser.search-placeholder: For example: diagnostics, term, invoice, ticket
